The foundry specializes in creating innovative and unconventional typefaces, often drawing inspiration from historical and obscure sources. name: Ek Type
og_description: Letterbox India is an initiative by the type designers at Ek Type, where they sketch and explore Indic letterforms at chai time. It’s a fun activity where they explore themes, typecookers and scripts. The explorations lead to multiple outcomes - from casual lettering to entire typefaces. Designers use multiple tools and since the time is limited to 15-20 minutes, the explorations start out fresh and rough. The chosen few lettering pieces are then fleshed out by either digitisation or by refining the handmade sketch. This is what you view on the letterbox page!

name: Vectro
og_description: Vectro is a type design studio that offers retail fonts, custom typeface design, and font production services. Vectro’s work explores intersections of technology, utility, and playfulness. Based in Portland, Oregon, Vectro was founded in 2021 by Travis Kochel and Lizy Gershenzon. The two have been design partners for over 10 years founding companies such as Future Fonts and the design studio Scribble Tone.

name: Zetafonts
og_description: Zetafonts is a independent type foundry established in 2001 by Francesco Canovaro, Debora Manetti and Cosimo Lorenzo Pancini. Powered by a team of branding and design veterans, Zetafonts offers a prolific portfolio of original typeface families, covering the world’s major script systems and proposing a wide range of innovative and stylish typographical solutions for digital and print designers.
